_comment: One row per forum topic; topic_id order 918→921. Ping asks for measurable hourly repo report.
ping_message:
[gasclaw-mgmt hourly] Answer in THIS thread using Markdown. Replies that are only "OK" or one line will fail the automated check.

You must report what you actually did in the **last hour** in your assigned repo (git commits, PRs, CI). Use this template:

## Past hour — repo
- **Repo:** `gastown-publish/<repo>` (exact name)
- **Commits:** short hash + description (or "none")
- **PRs:** merged/opened with # or URL
- **CI:** pass | fail | skipped (name workflow)

## Measurable
- Commits: n | PRs opened: n | PRs merged: n | Issues closed: n

## Work done
- Concrete bullets tied to the repo

## Blockers
- None or list

## Next hour
- Planned work

## Improvement
- One concrete thing you will do better (process, quality, or speed)

topics.label: gasclaw
topics.description: Primary Gasclaw agent (crew-1); OpenClaw bot for this topic only.
